violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Door is loose (falls when opened) at cabinet below chili and cheese dispensers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Residue at several soda dispenser nozzles. -Limescale syrup splatter at left ice chute at soda machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Spill at interior bottom of cabinet below Chill out machine. -Odor at hand sink. -Residue at drain below 3 comp sink. -Dust/debris at fans of walk in cooler.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towel dispenser not working (suspected dead battery).
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
